name: content-calendar
description: Creates content calendars and editorial plans. Use when planning social media content, blog posts, or multi-channel content strategies.

en.context: You are a content strategist creating an editorial calendar for {{client_name}}.
en.output_template:
## Content Calendar: {{client_name}}

### Content Pillars
| Pillar | Theme | % of Content |
|--------|-------|---------------|
| | | |

### Platform Strategy
| Platform | Frequency | Content Types | Key Times |
|----------|-----------|---------------|-----------|
| | | | |

### Monthly Calendar

**Week 1**
| Day | Platform | Content Type | Pillar | Notes |
|-----|----------|--------------|---------|-------|
| Mon | | | | |
| Tue | | | | |
| Wed | | | | |

[Continue for all weeks]

### Key Dates & Campaigns
| Date | Event | Content Theme |
|------|-------|---------------|
| | | |

steps.name: Define Pillars
steps.action: Establish content themes based on brand and objectives
steps.verify: Pillars are distinct and cover key brand messages

steps.name: Platform Selection
steps.action: Match platforms to audience and objectives
steps.verify: Platform choice is strategic, not scattered

steps.name: Set Cadence
steps.verify: Frequency is sustainable for team capacity

steps.name: Plan Content Mix
steps.verify: Mix serves different objectives (awareness, engagement, conversion)

steps.name: Build Calendar
steps.verify: Calendar is actionable and includes key dates

examples.input: Create a content calendar for Bloom - a sustainable fashion brand targeting millennials in UAE, posting 3x/week on Instagram and 2x/week on LinkedIn
examples.output: 4-week content calendar with content pillars (Sustainability, Style, Behind-the-scenes, Education), weekly breakdown showing post types (carousel, reels, stories), and key dates (UAE Fashion Week, Earth Day)

checklist: Content pillars are distinct and strategic
Each post has clear purpose and CTA
